summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Apixel Portfolio iteration 3 features. All new requirements successfully implemented and working correctly. Mobile theme toggle positioned next to hamburger menu, ScrollToTop functionality working, Store page copy updated, template cards with 4:3 aspect ratio and 'Visit Site' buttons, template detail routes removed, and admin login inputs cleaned up.
passed_tests: Backend health check and all API endpoints working (7/7 tests passed)
Mobile theme toggle button positioned next to hamburger menu (not inside dropdown)
ScrollToTop functionality working - pages start from scroll position 0 after navigation
Store page main heading updated: 'Websites and platforms we've shipped.'
Store page sub-heading updated: 'A selection of recent projects spanning agencies, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolios and more.'
Template cards have 4:3 aspect ratio images (aspect-[4/3] class)
Template cards show 'Visit Site' button with ArrowUpRight icon (not 'View Details')
'Visit Site' links open external demo URLs (e.g., https://agencypro-demo.apixel.net)
Template detail page route properly removed (404 or redirect)
Admin login inputs are clean without icon overlay (no Mail/Lock icons)
Admin login works with admin@agency.com / Admin@123 credentials
6 templates displayed on store page with badges ('Most Popular', 'Best Seller', 'Trending')
Theme toggle functionality working on both desktop and mobile
External demo links working with proper target='_blank' attribute
